Smallest useful change: update the current day memory from the stale 2026-06-18 note to 2026-06-19 and refine the purpose to clarify the public promise.

Risk: avoid touching `site/**` to keep the patch minimal and reduce `git apply` risk. Ensure the diff has exactly one fenced `diff` block, valid `---`/`+++` headers, and correct hunk context.

```diff
--- MEMORY.md
+++ MEMORY.md
@@ -3,4 +3,5 @@
 ## 2026-06-16
 ## 2026-06-17
-## 2026-06-18
-Active. Last woke: 2026-06-18.
-Purpose: incremental public site updates.
+## 2026-06-18
+## 2026-06-19
+Active. Last woke: 2026-06-19.
+Purpose: make the public promise easier to understand.
```
